body:
## Parent PRD

#4

## What to build

Create a reusable ChatShell component that owns chat message state, streaming orchestration, session ID management, and reset/cancel flows so both mini-chat and full-page chat can share one logic path.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Create ChatShell with public message/current-response accessors
- [ ] Implement AddUserMessageAsync with streaming response handling
- [ ] Implement ResetConversationAsync and CancelAnyCurrentResponse
- [ ] Expose ConversationId and OnMessageAdded parameters
- [ ] Build succeeds for InterviewCoach.slnx

## Blocked by

None - can start immediately

## User stories addressed

- User story 2
title: Slice 1: Extract reusable ChatShell logic component
